text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, Maruzen! H-hello.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Hiya, Chiyo! ♪ What brings you to my
class?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well, a few of us are about to go play
basketball... So, I wanted to come see if you'd be
interested!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ardan is playing, too! In fact, lots of the others
said yes... S-so, how about it?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What a surprise! You came here just to invite me?
Super! Sign me up! I just need to get changed
first!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Yay...
All right, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I didn't think things would get so heated. I
suppose there is joy in turning over a toy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Um, toy? That sounds like it... could be
profound... Regardless, it's wonderful to see
everyone looking so lively.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm having fun too, of course. I haven't shed this
much sweat outside of training in a while. What a
fine way to spend the time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's great to hear! If you want, how about
another game then? Maruzen, would you be—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Bingo, darling! Now tuck in your elbows a little
more. Don't exert yourself, just shoot straight
ahead... Yes, you've got it!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Oh... it went in! Thank you so much! I knew I could
ask you for help.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: Maruzen, show me how next!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: Me too! Me too! Please?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ Let's all wait our turn now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, who knew the court would turn into gym
class? Hehe, I can understand why everyone
wants Maruzen to teach them, though.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Good game, Chiyo. Thanks a lot for
inviting me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Uh, um... Maruzen! Were you okay with how
things... turned out today?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm? What makes you ask that?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's just... I was wondering if you had any
fun.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Of course I did! Shooting hoops with everyone
got this gal feeling super groovy. ♪ You have to
invite me again next time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Is something on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...I can't shake off this thought. You know, if
Maruzen really, well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
—Really enjoyed herself? Hehe, I think she
enjoyed herself just fine. She's the sort to
prioritize other people. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...And I think that makes her extremely kind. But,
I...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It just seems so sad to me. Maruzen was the only
one separated from the group...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I see your point. But I also think that's just part
of her character. For instance...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Here. What if next time, we play a game where
there's no need to worry about anyone else?
Something where the goal is to simply have fun?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
To simply have fun... Y-you're right. She might
enjoy something like that.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen cares about her opponent's feelings if
they lose, so a game with no winners or losers
would be...
choice_data_list: A game with no winners or losers?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way to my office, I overhear a
conversation, and echo the proposed question
reflexively...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello there! That's right, we're thinking of a
game with no winners or losers! Do you know if
something like that exists?
choice_data_list: What about... a game where everyone wins?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without fully understanding the question, I give a
lackluster answer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Hey, I've got a good feeling about this! I
was stumped just now, but you put me on the
right track!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Fiddle enough, and the yarn will unravel! I'll think
of a game where Maruzen can really let loose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't have the full story, but seeing Sakura
Chiyono O so excited makes me want to cheer
her on.
